reviews.review_text: Stayed here 3 nights in our caravan, Seaview sites were amazing?! Great location, we had the ebikes so got a good ride on around the trails. Camp kitchen, clean and tidy, toilets etc spotlessly clean. Lady on reception was extremely welcoming. Will definitely return here.

Unhelpful and cranky receptionist, not the owner. Called sea vu. All we saw was more caravans and mobile homes than you could possibly fit into the area in front of our cabin.  C vu as in caravan vu, NOT sea vu. We could barely see the real sea.

Stayed on a site at this park.

The location is absolutely fantastic. It is quite a narrow park but the price for a powered site in peak season was only 45 a night so well made up for the small hassle.

Sensational views from the beachfront park.
Showers have four hook, hence the 4 star rating
Lovely park with very clean amenities and camp kitchen. Friendly staff. Walking distance to shops etc. Would’ve given 5 stars if the van sites were a little easier to get into and park your vehicle.
Great Park to stay at. We had wonderful views of the ocean. They have good clean amenities. All the staff were wonderful and helpful. We would definitely stay there again 😉

Million dollar view  if your able to secure caravan spot on top of hill near   beach Cove  overlooking crystal blue  ocean . Stunning . Clean, easy to navigate  caravan park . Close to town . Robe is an incredible  town .
Beautiful limestone buildings  heritage.  And beautiful houses . Lovely bakery . Great pubs . Lovely shopping  boutiques.   We were fortunate to see a baby dolphin in the Marina  Cove feeding and then mama dolphin caught up with him  and then they both chased after a water bird  across the marina  amazing 👏 . A rare sight so close to us  where we were  standing.  What an experience 👏  The old jail  lighthouse  and beacon coastal walk was stunning . Dolphins frolicking in ocean  and wild flowers everywhere. Magical .

This is a spectacular location overlooking the water however the sites were sooooo jam packed, pretty small and with very difficult access - you had to reverse all the way down a narrow roadway to access your campsite, then manouvre around all of the other caravans and cars everywhere.  The toilets were clean but the showers were filthy with doors that had huge gaps either side so absolutely no privacy.

Apart from the view, this caravan park doesn’t have a lot going for it. The owners are not friendly and are actually quite rude. The sites are poorly maintained, the amenities are dirty, I don’t think they were cleaned at all during our two night stay. We had been travelling along the great ocean road, and this was a poor caravan park to end our trip at. The other amazing caravan parks we stayed at, with amazing service and unreal and clean amenities were much cheaper than the rip off they charge you at robe. Avoid, you can see the view from other areas in town and stay in another caravan park!
Camping with our R2 hybrid right at the front with great sea views. Walking distance into town and also great walks close by. Coastal walk yesterday up past the obelisk and today off to long beach
Beautiful spot next to the beach

If you have a large caravan you will struggle to park the car on the site without impacting your outside area.  The location is great but maybe if they lost a site /sites on the school side this would allow for wider sites.

Strak aan zee, mooie uitzichten! Het dorpje Robe (puur touristisch) ligt tegen de camping aan.  Mooie wandeling door alles wat het dorp bied op een schitterend pad, alles bij elkaar kilometer of 8. |Wij zaten 1 rij van zeezicht af, maar da's niet verkeerd. Stevig windje vanaf de oceaan

Völlig überteuert für den gebotenen Service. Die Toiletten / Badräume sind mindestens zwei Tage nicht gereinigt worden!
Der Standort direkt am Meer ist ganz nett. Es gibt zwei direkte Zugänge zum Strand.

We are on a powered site for a few days
We are in a small Jpod so lots of room for us
Also short walk to town

Just there Monday to Thursday in Cabin 20. We seemed to have received a slight upgrade so thankyou for that!
Cabin was fairly modern and quiet at night but we weren't there on a Friday or weekend. No lounge/sofa due to the design layout but a separate toilet with it's own basin. Curtains are needed in the two separate bedrooms to block the light coming in from the edges of the Holland blinds.
Overall though, a good experience thankyou. 4.3 Stars
Great location  , clean amenities. Beach front with an alley way walking track to the centre of town.
Very nice
Ok for stop over,quite great views,breaky in morning outside gate was nice
Stated on a ocean view caravan site. Great view, walking distance to beach & town. Planning to come back again!

We were late to check out by 30 min since one of us woke up sick. They were pretty aggressive and claimed someone is coming to our site even though there was many free sites around us. Usually caravan parks are way more friendly.
The location is incredible.

Awesome spot with amazing views and fastidiously maintained facilities. Being only a few minutes walk from town makes it a perfect location!

We stayed in a caravan spot so no rating on the rooms applies.
Tight caravan spots but good location

Beautiful location overlooking the water, close to town and nice staff! Private beach to the caravan park and has a little cove over some rocks to a secret beach at low tide. The water is amazing to swim in and the park itself if one of my favourites. Love Robe!!

Fantastic location right on the coast. We booked last minute and they had sites left overlooking the amazing view. Only used the amenities block but it was clean. Staff friendly enough. Park was quiet which was lovely.. might be different in high season.

A great location for a coastal stay! We were in a studio cabin. The only (tiny) criticism is the lack of space between the bed and the window. Another 5cm would have made it possible to exit the bed more easily. It was very clean and comfortable. The staff were very friendly and professional. It is conveniently located within walking distance to town centre via a walkway.
The camp kitchen and bathroom facilities are impressive.
Great spot. Love the view.
I stayed in a cabin with my parents. Great location and sea views. Electric blanket on Queen bed but not on the bunks.

Mum and my sister just got home yesterday from an eight day holiday at the beautiful non stress Sea Vu Caravan park. Prices were very reasonable which left our family with plenty of cash to explore what Robe had to offer. Just like Sea Vu,  there were a number of attractions and many places to eat day or night.  To sum up, there were many establishments to see, looked after by many residents.  All the best Sea Vu Caravan Park,  hope to see your happy faces again.  Yours Sincerely, Gregory Brown.
Amazing spot!
nice view
Good accommodation
Very nice place to stay clean and well laid out caravan park

We stayed in caravan on site with ocean views, it was not busy so we had space around us and we were literally next to the beach.
If it were peak season I would think it to be pretty tight, but that’s why we are here at this time of the year.

Facilities are all here, clean and tidy.
Book early for the best view sites.

Sensational views in a sensational spot we were there during a quiet time but I don’t think we would fit on the site if the park was full. We have a 20ft van and a RAM and the car could not fit in the site with us - thankfully there was empty sites beside us and we could park there but if you love a view this place has amazing views.

It was ok. A cabin pretty cold. The portable heater struggled to warm it up. The drive way to the cabin was tight and it didn't help that the person staying opposite two doors down had parked in the entrance for the entire stay, making he hard for me and everyone else to get in and out. They were from Victoria, Maybe that's the done thing there 🤷🏼‍♂️. The beach access path was closed. Work men were using a circular saw just behind the cabin, which was very loud.
Great compact park in the centre of town. Good rates. Top location. Friendly staff.
Stunning location even in the rain! I opted for a cheap room and it was neat and tidy. Easy walk to the Main Street or along the beach to the pub.
Cabin was very tired. Overpriced.
Stunning place 😍 ✨️ 👌 💕
We got an early checkin, got Room 5 facing the sea, superb view,.utensils were sufficient for us to cook, you get what you paid for.

We loved our visit to Robe and Sea Vu in late April of this year. Sally who was in reception was very helpful with local advice and suggestions when we checked in. Met some lovely neighbors staying as well in our vans. We will come back; views, and hospitality are such a winner! Thank you 😊

Had a powered site for my campervan,and it was fabulous.Awesome views ,very friendly staff,great clean amenities, camp kitchen looked awesome,but I didn't need to use it.Overall a really great place within walking distance of all the shops
Such a lovely spot with an amazing view!  Walking distance to restaurants, shops and beaches. Highly recommend 😊😊😊😊
Beach front site and my goodness what a beautiful view 😍 definitely worth the Robe stop 🇦🇺🫶
Great facilities, tight but fair. Enjoyed the stay.
Great spot in a lovely small town. Very close to beach and sea, and short walk to the main Street that has everything. Very relaxing break.
Awesome park 5 minutes walk to town beach at your door step great toilet block very clean
Location with matching service
Great view to ocean.  clean amenities.   could have been another block due to size of park.    short walk to town  friendly greeting  thank you

Stayed in deluxe cabin 11 for 4 nights.
Just not long enough.
Friendly park, amazing location and facilities.
Parked our car and walked easily everywhere all week. Incredible views from our cabin, great walks and beach is perfect. Our cabin a little dated but well equipped. Recommend maybe some new towels?
Can't wait to stay again.

Thank you 😊

Nice place, clean and tidy facilities, close to town.
The staff are not the most helpful compared to other sites I  have been to.

4 star as the amenities weren’t cleaned enough was disgusted with used pads in the girls shower last night
Other then that perfect location
Location is fantastic, amenities are great, Robe is a beautiful spot, only downside is very tight caravan spots if full just no swing, but otherwise fantastic

Best View ! The new cabin was so fresh and clean. We loved the staff’s friendliness and tip top service that surpassed our expectations. A wonderful memory and Wil definitely return . Go visit you won’t be disappointed
Great location, great view, friendly staff and very tidy and clean
Cabin with sea views was great. Friendly helpful hosts. Walking distance to shops & restaurants. Spacious park layout with tiered rows giving many campers spectacular views. Top spot.

Fantastic site in such a beautiful part of Robe. Facilities excellent and staff super helpful. Can't wait to go back next year.
Jo and Jez Robinson
Very beautiful place,only spoilt by the gale blowing and the flies.

Obwohl wir nach den Öffnungszeiten angekommen sind, haben wir noch einen schönen Platz bekommen. Die Dame am Telefon war sehr freundlich. Der Platz hat zwei Abteile, eines zum Meer und einen zum Land. Die Sanitären Anlagen waren sauber und genügend für die Leute. Die Küche war groß genug. Wir haben 45$ für eine Nacht gezahlt.

What a great place to stay with your family. Large cabin fit 6 adults and a young toddler no problem and the extra shared BBQ facilities were appreciated, as the stove top/oven in our cabin wasn’t the best. We had a direct view to the ocean and the beach was a two minute walk from our door. The park also had a playground that our child appreciated.

The Foodland is under a 10 minute walk from the park so we were able to get groceries while keeping the vehicle parked, which was convenient.
Loved it - we set a tent up on an ocean view powered site - view is incredible! Close walk to town and beach. Very friendly campground - we would definitely stay here again!
A little small, but great value for money, right by the sea.

Avoid cabin 5.
No aircon (which I was told so that's ok).
But the room backs onto their works yard.
I'm here for 5 days. This is day two.
Yesterday all I heard was crashing and banging of the recycle bins, Radio blaring and talking. Right outside the bedroom window. Worse because you have to have the windows open. Today chainsaw been going for the last half hour.
So disappointed. 😭

Fantastic ocean views and beach front.  |Well looked after caravan park.  Clean and maintained.  Fantastic camp kitchen and has a separate fish cleaning area.  Out side shower for beach goers with sand all over them.  Must use those showers before using the inside shower facilities.  Although alot of people ignored that. Was a tad annoying when going to the showers and having to clean the sand out before using them.

A very nice campsite, kept in excellent condition. Handy for the shops without being noisy. Excellent facilities, with the best camp kitchen we have ever come across. The hosts were very welcoming. The office keeps excellent visitor information on many areas across the state

Not the best park we pulled into the wrong park but stayed unfortunately the lady in the office had very little local knowledge outside of the park 🤷‍♀️ and also put us in a site that was wet not ideal when your on a motorcycle towing a camper she didn’t care less and the caravan next to us was running their grey water on the ground next to us !!  No hose straight out of a tap yuck..Boy it’s stunk!! We weren’t on the beach front and it was gated looked horrible …was however close to everything which was a bonus 👏👏 I have to say that leaving the radio on in the bathrooms loud as was annoying and had to listen to Church service on Sunday morning 🤣 all I could think was get me out of here won’t be staying again

5 stars all around...had a ocean view site and what a view!!!
Place was clean, staff were very friendly and helpful. Fantastic location walking distance to town
Highly recommend.

The location is it's best point as it's walking distance to shops and points of interest. Park has nice amenities including a well equipped camp kitchen and seating area with a long table. There is also a separate fish cleaning area and sullage point. As caravan parks go, this is a good one.

We booked a 2 bedroom deluxe sea view cabin. Plenty enough room in bedroom and lounge and comfy enough beds. Kitchen small as expected, a 2 ring hob (extra 2 ring plug in in cupboard) with a microwave and a mini  1 shelf oven which we grilled garlic bread in and fine for that. Really near Robe centre so fab for groceries, cafes and restaurants. The sea view is a bit dependent on who parks in front of you as there are pitches in front of the cabins where those pulling trailers and their own small camper vans park so you kind of look over the top and round the side of them to the sea. Beach really near and gorgeous. Site facilities look excellent for campers. Reception staff lovely. Good value.
Great location for a caravan park.  Easy walk i to town.
Love that this is right on the beach and can take your dogs there.
Fantastic views
Excellent location, we had a premium waterfront site. Short stroll into town. Very nice place to stay.

Wir verbrachten eine Nacht auf diesem Campingplatz und waren grundsätzlich zufrieden. Die Cabin entsprach unseren Erwartungen, war zweckmässig und sauber. Leider funktionierte die eine Kochplatte nicht. Wir konnten uns jedoch mit der grossen Pfanne auf der kleinen Platte trotzdem etwas zum Essen kochen. Der Internetempfang war leider sehr schwach, was schade ist, wenn ein WiFi explizit vorhanden ist. Der Campingplatz ist toll gelegen, direkt am Strand und nahe vom Zentrum. Wie vieler Orts gilt es auch in Robe zu beachten, dass Restaurants nicht jeden Tag geöffnet haben.
We got a spot for our motorhome with ocean view - amazing!
Unbeatable location, great facilities, clean.. all you need!

Re Caravan Sites only (not cabins).|We were asked when booking would we like a site with a view but in the wind or a site out of the wind at the back.|A view every time for me & isn’t the whole advertising about this place about that view!|We were disappointed. |The caravan sites are too small, difficult to reverse in to, very cramped & we were hemmed in on all sides by other campers. I even commented to my hubby that from every single window in our van had a view of, not the ocean, but other campers & very close! |We could only have our awning out a little as the next camper trailer had their awning onto our site. We couldn’t get the car off the road as there was simply no room. |I was worried about getting out the next day. Luckily the large van that was in the next site was replaced by a tiny camper…otherwise I think we would still be there!|A guy in a camper had to ask the couple in the next site to move their swags as they were so close that he felt uncomfortable!|We had a wander around the park. The back of the site is very unappealing with some work going on so lots of trucks coming & going. |Upside is that it is an easy walk to town & the lovely beach.|Feel like this park needs some more tlc & consideration to paying customers.

We love robe and this caravan park provides the best ocean views straight from your caravan windows our son dose wish it has a games room tho as he loves to see what games are I'm different games rooms around Australia's caravan parks 🤣 but lucky for us we save money when there isn't one in a caravan park 😉

We booked an ocean view superior cabin and WOW WOW WOW. Modern 2 bed cabin with uninterrupted panoramic view of Guichen Bay - it really was incredible. On top of that the cabin was so modern clean and well appointed. This place was our favourite stop on our Melbourne to Adelaide road trip.

Sea Vu Robe was simply amazing and had everything our family could have asked for.  We stayed in a Seaside Cabin which had beautiful sea views from our bed.  The Caravan park had perfect amenities a minute walk you were down by the beach playing in the sand.  Sally in reception was super lovely and always greeted us with a smile.  The kitchen amenities, laundry room and playground were all very close to hand.  Our cabin was clean, spacious and honestly had more then we needed.  For the three nights we stayed, we could not fault this place and will always come back!
Great facilities and amazing location

This caravan park is small and probably a little dates, but is clean and in an exceptional location. Would love to see some more modern cabins and would pay more for these if the option was available. Decent facilities.
Awesome caravan park. Staff were so lovely and helpful. Can't wait to stay again!!
Great park right on the shore. Everything is so clean and tidy.

The location is amazing . Easy walk to shops ,cafes, pubs and  restaurants and  each walks. The view is amazing.  Terrific fish and chips very close. Amenities are immaculate and staff super friendly.  We've stayed twice and will be booking again.
Loved the views from here, and the cabin was pet friendly.

My hoomans and I thoroughly enjoyed our stay here to soak up some winter sun by the beach.|We booked a powered site right down the front near the beach where we enjoyed gorgeous sunsets.|The park was quiet and frequented by many “Grey Nomads” who were more than happy to share their travel tips and places to see.|We walked along the beach and took in the local sites, it’s a beautiful part of the world.|The park was very clean and well maintained with friendly, helpful staff. We even decided to stay an extra night.|We weren’t travelling with a dog, but from what we saw, this park is very accomodating for their furry guests as well.
Beautiful park and well maintained. Caravan sites are a bit tight for bigger vans.
WOW
Great cabins and views from them

Park is lovely! Great facilities and beautiful views. The sites could be a bit bigger, but the prices are significantly less than the other parks. It was clean, walking distance to the pub and has direct beach access! Have been there twice!
In a van. Location is fantastic but the sites are a little tight.very friendly staff.

We booked for 2 nights in our Motorhome a powered site with beautiful ocean views as good as you would see
Great amentaties clean and large had fish on the barbie at the camp kitchen
Extremely friendly staff the lady at reception was so helpful in giving us ideas for things to see in Robe
We both agree this CP rates a 10/10 as good as we have seen on our OZ travels

Very tight caravan spaces.  Roads for van sites are dead ends so makes it hard to squeeze your van in (21ft) to your space. No room to put your car...pretty much van and annex take up all the space.  Access  to beach is good.   We have stayed in about 20 caravan sites over the last 3 months and Sea Vu is near the bottom of the list.

What a fantastic and super clean park with a excellent view of the ocean and staff are very helpful and very friendly, we had a caravan site pretty much on the beach and was a decent size as well, highly recommend

We booked a water view cabin and the views didn’t disappoint, large park very popular for camping and caravans.  Staff were all lovely and friendly, the shop was a bit sparse but we didn’t need anything so it was ok.  Very handy shortcut walking track straight into town.  Staff provided some great recommendations on things to see and do while only on the area a short time and also recommended where to eat.  Cabin was a bit dated and the ac/heating unit is very old but it worked.

This park is virtually 'on the beach' and right in the middle of town - it's perfect!  We stayed in a cabin that was spotless and had everything we could have wanted including sea views!  This venue is excellently managed with friendly staff who apparently love their jobs.  There is a great walking track along the top of the beach and although it was too cold for us to swim, we had a wonderful week there.
Heaven!
Great place to visit and stay

A great place to stay with amazing sea views! A good camp kitchen with utensils! Nice bathrooms/ with fantastic shower heads! The only suggestion is about the mop and bucket. That large heavy cotton mop head is too wet to mop the shower cubicles dry. Maybe a lighter smaller mop head which hangs on a hook above a shallow bucket of water could be helpful, thus is what I see at other c’van parks! 👍

We booked a deluxe sea view cabin & it was sensational! Clean, well equipped with great kitchen (convection microwave & induction cook top), very functional bathroom, 2 bedrooms with queen beds, spacious lounge with dining space for four & lovely outdoor deck with bench table & chairs all with an amazing ocean view. The park was clean, had great facilities (common room, huge indoor common kitchen with plenty of facilities (BBQs, pots, pans), fish cleaning room & sullage dump point, spacious sites & was really well organised. Easy walk to beach & Robe township.

Another lovely stay at Sea Vu . Fresh air , picturesque views with beautiful walk's in every direction . Had an interesting talk with Lisa , the owner and learned quite a bit about the park . We have already booked our next stay this time to include a footy match . Well done Lisa .

The location of this Caravan Park is fantastic. A very short stroll to the beach , shops, cafes, restaurants, and historic sites.
BUT- the sites on the middle terrace are too small for the average van and car. Dangerously small!  To back the van into the narrow, short site ( with high gutters) meant that neighbouring van owners had to temporarily move their cars out of the way, and as we planned on leaving around 8.30am we had to make sure our neighbour was around that time to move his car so we could use the front corner of his site to get out. At the very least the park owners could help by using a small tractor to position the vans .
Or use the middle terrace sites for small vans such as A vans , or campers in tents.
SECONDLY- the showers turned cold after about 1 minute!!! This was about 7.30 pm.
A wonderful caravan park right on the water, awesome views if you stay at the front of the park.
Very Easy for waking into town and beach

Our stay at the park was second to none , we loved it there. The care taker was so helpful and went far above the call of duty to help us in any way he could.The lady at reception  was kind and friendly and very helpful too.The park was clean and tidy and well maintained. The toilets and showers were extremely clean the sites were large and in great condition . We loved staying there and would recommend it to anyone . We have traveled all over Australia and would have to say this was the best.
Great location with walks, shopping, and dining very close by.

Ein sehr schöner, sauberer und gepflegter Campingplatz. Die sanitären Anlagen tip top. Unser Standort mit Camper in der ersten Reihe war Mega!!! Und das alles für kleines Geld. Der Platz liegt direkt in der Nähe zur kleinen City. 02:2024
Friendly staff. Good price for family of 4 2 kids under 2. Good views and an easy walk to the main street
Nice pitch, clean facilities, great location.

Wahre mit unserem Campr dort. Der Platz ist terassenförmig angelegt mit großen Stellplätzen. Die Fasilitis sind einfach super sauber, hell und geräumig. Wir waren 3 Tage hier. Ein Supermarkt ist fußläufig von hier gut zu erreichen. Robe ist sicher ein paar Tage wert um sich zu erholen.

Staff were very nice and the facilities were good.  We had no view where we were (down at the bottom of the hill).  The powered sites are very small and the roads very narrow so it feels like you're literally PACKED in.  We also had some extremely inconsiderate campers around us who blared music and talked loudly until well past 11:00pm.  There is no after-hours number (that we could see).  A suggestion would be for the staff to do a drive-around at 10:00pm to ensure everyone is complying.  The town is close by and the park is well-situated to other attractions but we probably wouldn't stay here again.

Amazing views from this park. Was quite a pleasant stay. Great grassy sites for a tent to be pitched. Amazing camp kitchen and facilities. A food truck on site during the busy period. Easy access for late check ins. Only issue was our site being next to a walkway that the kids used to get to and from the playground a lot and a light pole that shone directly on our tent making it hard to sleep. Things I’d only nit pick for someone who’s on the road a lot. Otherwise, a joyful stay in a beautiful town.

Sea Vu has great facilities and an amazing view of the beach overall my stay at Sea Vu was amazing.Although one thing that really set me off was a man cleaning the women’s restroom at peak times as a teenage girl this did make me feel quite uncomfortable knowing that i was showering and going to the bathroom in the same room as a man. I have also talked to other residents of the park and I found out that this was also an issue with them.
Stayed at cabin 17, staring directly at the ocean. Amazing views and a newly built cabin.
Cooler Platz mit Meeresblick. Freundliches Personal,  sanitäre Anlagen könnten ein wenig sauberer sein. Waren eine Nacht dort mit dem Camper.

Nous sommes arrivés après la fermeture de l'accueil, un interphone nous a permis de discuter avec le responsable, qui nous a dit de nous mettre sur un emplacement et que l'on pourrait payer le lendemain matin. 40 dollars avec électricité pour un camping-car.
Nice. Comfortable.  Great views.

Le camping est situé sur les hauteurs de Robe, face à la mer. La vue est magnifique. Accès direct à la plage et aux falaises qui vous permettent de rejoindre le centre de la ville. La proximité des commerces et des restaurant est appréciable. Sanitaires et espaces communs très fonctionnels et très propres. Pas mal de choses à voir sur Robe (obélisque, jetée, musée etc...). Un très joli village. Je recommande

Great spot and views but very exposed to get the views, so a little difficult unless weather in perfect. No refund policy, so beware. Not very understanding.
Camp kitchen and playground very dated.
Wouldn’t come back.
Very good. Great location.
Lovely spot to spend a night with the grand kids. The amenities were kept very clean and well maintained. Would be happy to return.

Great park
Great location, walking distance to main st & shops
Beautiful water view Camp spots
Fantastic setting beautiful views
Fantastic park with amazing views and great beach access. Easy walking distance to everything in town. We'll be back for sure!
Right on the beach, get a Cabin with an awesome sea view!
Beautiful camp, backing directly on to the beach with fantastically clean and modern  facilities! Bedr place to stay with secret access path to main shops 😎👊✨️
Perfect idea of a caravan park. Spectacular views of the ocean. Staff were friendly and professional.  Amenities were clean and working.
What a spot!! Site right on the sea front, spectacular!! Very clean amenities and great location with a nice stroll along the beach to the shops. Have already rebooked our next stay.

Lisa was the perfect host. Very friendly and helpful, A spot became available right on the beachfront when we checked in. Beautiful views, and so easy to walk to the town shops. Amenities very clean, park set out to cater for everyone. Would definitely come back here.

Very welcoming and helpful at the desk on checkin. Fabulous location we close a Ocean View site which was close to the ramp entrance to the sand and beach. There was great facilities dump spot and fish cleaning allowed. Right in the middle of town we could park the RV and explore on foot. A beautiful town even on the rainy days that we were there. Loved to come back in warmer weather … perfect spot
Great views and service.

We loved the location of this park, right on the water. Unfortunately it stormed the whole time we were here. But we made the most of it and would get out of the van. Robe is a beautiful seaside town. Staff really friendly. Spots are pretty close together. But we enjoyed the park.
Stunning view, but when i was going to use the BBQ facility, they were out of order. Unfortunately It's 6pm. No one can help.

Beautiful caravan park- sad we couldn’t stay longer! But when we’re in the area again we will make sure to visit. We stayed in a cabin, location was great and the amenities were awesome. Super lovely staff. Enjoyed very much!
